name: Radial — Drug Mechanism of Action (7 pathways)
input: Create a radial diagram showing drug mechanism of action: Central topic is 'Metformin MOA' with 7 pathways: AMPK Activation, Hepatic Glucose Reduction, Insulin Sensitivity, Mitochondrial Complex I, Gut Microbiome, GLP-1 Secretion, Lipid Metabolism.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Radial hub-and-spoke diagram with 7 distinct pathways around central topic.

data.title: Metformin Mechanism of Action

items.label: AMPK Activation
items.description: Primary pathway: activates AMP-activated protein kinase

items.label: Hepatic Glucose Reduction
items.description: Decreases hepatic glucose production via gluconeogenesis inhibition

items.label: Insulin Sensitivity
items.description: Improves peripheral glucose uptake in skeletal muscle

items.label: Mitochondrial Complex I
items.description: Inhibits respiratory chain complex I, alters energy metabolism

items.label: Gut Microbiome
items.description: Modulates intestinal microbiota composition and function

items.label: GLP-1 Secretion
items.description: Enhances incretin hormone release from intestinal L-cells

items.label: Lipid Metabolism
items.description: Reduces circulating free fatty acids and triglycerides

data.caption: Seven mechanisms of action for metformin in type 2 diabetes management
